title: Boise Cascade (BCC) Q2 Earnings & Sales Top Estimates, Down Y/Y
author: N/A
description: Boise Cascade reported decent Q2 2024 results, with earnings and sales beating estimates, but both declined year-over-year due to weak demand and lower volumes. The company expects solid results in H2 2024 and is optimistic about the increasing trajectory of single-family housing starts.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company reported decent Q2 2024 results, with earnings and sales beating estimates, but both declined year-over-year due to weak demand and lower volumes. However, the company is optimistic about the future and expects solid results in H2 2024.

KBR reported mixed Q2 2024 results, with earnings surpassing the consensus estimate and revenues missing it. However, the top and bottom lines increased year-over-year, and the company raised its adjusted EBITDA and cash flow guidance for 2024.

Armstrong World Industries reported solid Q2 2024 results, with earnings and net sales topping the consensus estimate and increasing year-over-year. The growth was backed by solid contributions from the Mineral Fiber and Architectural Specialties segments.

Gibraltar Industries reported strong Q2 2024 earnings despite top-line woes. Although earnings and net sales missed the consensus estimate, the bottom line strengthened year-over-year. The company has slightly reduced its net sales outlook for 2024 but continues to focus on driving participation gains across the segments.
